name: csrd
description: EU CSRD (Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive, EU 2022/2464) compliance advisor — scope & threshold analysis (large PIEs, other large, listed SMEs, non-EU), double materiality assessment (DMA), ESRS gap assessment, ESRS E1–E5 environmental disclosures, ESRS S1–S4 social disclosures, ESRS G1 governance, Scope 1/2/3 GHG emissions, transition plan drafting, assurance readiness, XBRL tagging, value chain reporting, and CSRD vs GRI/TCFD/SASB comparison.
